<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Country Charm](08-country-charm.jpg)

Inspired by the cottage gardens we used to walk past on the way to school. Slightly wild, slightly fragrant, always tied with twine. Looks best on a kitchen table next to the morning post.

## What's in it

- Sweet williams
- Alchemilla mollis
- Foxgloves (where in season)
- Mint and rosemary

## Care

Refresh the herbs daily — pinch off any wilted leaves to keep the bouquet looking lively.
